title: FSR Dyed
body:
**This project has been discontinued due to Furfsky implementing a way to show dyed armor within their texture pack.**

Furfsky, but dyed!

I do not claim credit for Furfsky Reborn or any of its textures, my pack is simply an edit removing certain textures from the official pack which can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn)!

**REQUIRES OPTIFINE 1.8.9** to work and **optionally** requires NotEnoughUpdates for custom skull textures and custom block textures in SkyBlock's mining areas.

Thank you to nightlibra for the Enchanted Book Overlays! The official download to this can be found [here](https://hypixel.net/threads/enchanted-book-overlays-for-skyblock-v3-8-refrigerate-minor-tweaks.4026138/)!

I do claim credit for the following textures:

```
General's Medallion
Talisman of the Century
Anita's Talisman
Anita's Ring
Anita's Artifact
Dark Claymore Animations
Soulflow Accessory line Animations
Peak Of The Mountain 0-10
```
